login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Pick up exactly where you left off.

signup.title: Start learning
signup.subtitle: Create your account and begin your blockchain education today.
signup.termsAccept: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailSentSubtitle: We've sent a reset link to your email. It expires in 30 minutes.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now log in.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor verification
twoFactor.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

onboarding.step1Body: Every concept is a hands-on mission — scenarios, simulations, and real decisions. No passive reading.
onboarding.step2Body: Complete missions to earn KT. You'll even pay gas fees — just like the real thing.
onboarding.step3Body: See your streak, your token balance, and exactly where you stand in the curriculum.
onboarding.firstMissionPrompt: Your first mission is ready. It takes about 5 minutes.

SI.instructionPrefix: Read the scenario, then choose the best answer.

CM.instructionPrefix: Match each concept to its correct description.

IP.instructionPrefix: Drag each item to the correct position.

ST.instructionPrefix: Work through each step of this simulation.

exercise.gasFeeFirstTime: Each exercise attempt costs 2 KT. This is gas — the same mechanism you just studied. Your balance has been updated.
exercise.gasFeeLowBalance: −2 KT gas · Your balance is running low. Complete a mission to top up.
exercise.gasFeeZeroBalance: −2 KT gas · Your balance is at 0. You can still continue this mission, but you'll need to complete it before starting a new one.
exercise.gasFeeNegativeBalance: −2 KT gas · Your balance is below 0. Complete this mission to earn tokens and clear your debt before starting anything new.

BLOCKCHAIN_BEGINNER.toastBody: You understand the problem blockchain solves.

CRYPTO_CURIOUS.toastBody: Coins, tokens, volatility — you've got the vocabulary.

WALLET_WIZARD.toastBody: Wallets, transactions, gas. You know how it actually works.

SMART_COOKIE.toastBody: Blockchain as a computer. You now see what's possible.

NFT_NATIVE.toastBody: You can see through the hype now.

DEFI_EXPLORER.toastBody: All six categories. Every concept. You earned this.

FIRST_TOKENS.toastBody: Your first Knowledge Tokens are in. The balance only goes up from here.

TOKEN_COLLECTOR.toastBody: Halfway to a hundred. Consistent effort compounds.

TOKEN_RICH.toastBody: Your balance just hit triple digits.

GETTING_STARTED.toastBody: Consistency is a skill. You're building it.

WEEK_WARRIOR.toastBody: A full week without missing a day.

DEDICATED_LEARNER.toastBody: Two weeks straight. This is a habit now.

MONTHLY_MASTER.toastBody: A month of daily learning. That's remarkable.

streak.streakBroken: Your streak ended at {n} days. Start a new one today.
streak.day3: Three days running. You're past the hardest part.
streak.day7: Seven days. A week of showing up. This is what learning looks like.
streak.day14: Two weeks straight. At this point, the habit is doing most of the work.
streak.day30: Thirty days. A month. The consistency you've shown here transfers to everything.
streak.streakLost: You missed a day. It happens. Your progress is exactly where you left it — start again from today.
streak.streakRecovered: Back. One day doesn't define a streak. Today does.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.noRankYet: Complete a mission to appear on the leaderboard.

welcomeBack.shortAbsence: Good to have you back. Your progress is right where you left it.
welcomeBack.oneWeekAbsence: It's been a week. No worries — your knowledge doesn't expire. Pick up where you stopped.
welcomeBack.twoWeekAbsence: You've been away a while. Everything is still here. Whenever you're ready, the next mission is waiting.
welcomeBack.longAbsence: Welcome back. It's been a while, but what you learned hasn't gone anywhere. There's no pressure — just the next mission when you're ready.
welcomeBack.generic: Back again. Your progress is intact. Carry on.

refresher.variant1: Before you start, here's a quick reminder of what this mission builds on.
refresher.variant2: It's been a while since you covered this topic. A quick recap before you dive in.
refresher.variant3: This mission references something from earlier. Here's the key idea — thirty seconds, then you're ready.

postMission.correct1: Correct. Another piece of the picture in place.
postMission.correct2: Well done. That concept is yours now.
postMission.correct3: Nailed it. On to the next one.
postMission.correct4: That's right. You just added to something that compounds.
postMission.chapterComplete1: Chapter complete. You've covered the full scope of this topic. The next chapter builds on what you just finished.
postMission.chapterComplete2: That's the whole chapter. Every concept in there is part of your foundation now.
postMission.chapterComplete3: Chapter done. Take a moment — this is real progress.
postMission.categoryComplete1: Category complete. You've finished everything in this section. The next category takes what you've learned here and goes further.
postMission.categoryComplete2: You've completed this category. Six sections total — this is one of them done. Keep going.

tokensRevealed.headline: You just earned your first Knowledge Tokens.
tokensRevealed.body: Every mission you complete adds to your balance. These tokens aren't just a score — they represent something real. Keep learning to find out what.

walletRevealed.headline: Your wallet is now active.
walletRevealed.body: This is where your Knowledge Tokens live. In the real world, a wallet like this holds digital assets only you control — no bank, no middleman.

gasRevealed.headline: Gas fees: now it's personal.
gasRevealed.body: From this point on, every exercise attempt costs 2 KT. That's gas — the same mechanism that powers every real blockchain transaction. Complete missions to keep your balance topped up.

dashboardRevealed.headline: Your dashboard is ready.
dashboardRevealed.body: Track your streak, your token balance, your rank on the leaderboard, and every achievement you've unlocked — all in one place.

disclaimer.gateTitle: A quick note before you continue
disclaimer.gateBody: The content in this chapter discusses financial topics, including cryptocurrency prices, investment concepts, and financial instruments. This content is for educational purposes only. Nothing in this chapter is financial advice, and nothing you learn here should be treated as a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any asset. Financial decisions involve real risk. If you're considering any investment, speak with a qualified financial adviser.

certificate.headline: You've completed Transcendence.
certificate.subheadline: Six categories. 69 missions. All of it done.
certificate.shareBody: I just completed Transcendence — a full blockchain literacy course. 69 missions, zero shortcuts.

friendsList.title: Friends
friendsList.noFriendsYet: No friends added yet. Find someone to learn alongside.

errors.networkError: Can't reach the server right now. Check your connection and try again.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Try again in a moment.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to view this.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Log in again to continue.
errors.formValidation: Please check the fields above and try again.
errors.emailAlreadyUsed: An account with this email already exists. Try logging in instead.
errors.usernameAlreadyUsed: That username is taken. Try a different one.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Wait a moment, then try again.

emptyStates.noFriends: You haven't added any friends yet. Search by username to find someone to learn alongside.
emptyStates.noNotifications: No notifications right now. Come back after your next mission.
emptyStates.noAchievements: No achievements yet. Complete your first mission to get started.
emptyStates.noMissionsAvailable: No missions available right now. Finish the current chapter to unlock more.
emptyStates.leaderboardLoading: Loading the leaderboard... Complete a mission to claim your spot.
